fields.name: txtOverpayment
fields.fieldText: You have a pending overpayment that requires your review. Please select the Overpayment button to view and approve the overpayment.

fields.name: txtOverpayments
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Your overpayment has been approved and will be automatically deducted from your next pay.

fields.name: txtPendingOverpayment
fields.fieldText:
The following overpayments are awaiting your review.

Please select the overpayments from the table below and click Approve.

If you would like to discuss any overpayment before proceeding, please contact your payroll department.

fields.name: Superannuation_Fund
fields.helpText: Superannuation Fund for your salary sacrifice. If you want to salary sacrifice to a fund not listed, please contact payroll.

fields.name: Effective_Date
fields.helpText: Date you want the Salary Sacrifice to commence. This must be greater than your last payment date on {!Get_Pay_Batch.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c}.

validationRule.errorMessage: Effective Date cannot be before your last payment date. The effective date must be greater than or equal to {!frmEffectiveDate}

fields.name: txtAlreadyCancelled
fields.fieldText: Salary Sacrifice has already been cancelled in the past.

fields.name: txtCancel
fields.fieldText: Are you sure you want to cancel this Salary Sacrifice Deduction?

fields.name: Expiry_Date
fields.helpText: Expiry Date must be greater than your last payment period or the Deductions current effective date if later. The earliest expiry date you can enter is {!frmExpiryDate}.

validationRule.errorMessage: Expiry Date must be greater than your last payment period or the Deductions current effective date if later. The earliest expiry date you can enter is {!frmExpiryDate}.

fields.name: txtCancelled
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Your Salary Sacrifice has been cancelled effective {!Expiry_Date}.

fields.name: txtSuccess
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Your new Salary Sacrifice request has been sent to payroll.

Please note that payroll may require additional information before processing your request.

fields.name: txtNoSelection
fields.fieldText:
You haven't chosen anything yet.

To pick a record, hit the "Previous" button and select one, or if you want to leave, simply press "Finish."

fields.name: txtViewDeduction
fields.fieldText:
Superannuation Fund: {!DataTableSuperDeductions.firstSelectedRow.Superannuation_Fund__c}

Deduction Rate Type: {!DataTableSuperDeductions.firstSelectedRow.tc9_pr__Deduction_Rate_Type__c}

Deduction Rate: {!DataTableSuperDeductions.firstSelectedRow.tc9_pr__Deduction_Rate__c}

Effective Date: {!DataTableSuperDeductions.firstSelectedRow.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c}

Expiry Date: {!DataTableSuperDeductions.firstSelectedRow.tc9_pr__Expiry_Date__c}

fields.name: txtEdit
fields.fieldText:
You can't modify an existing Salary Sacrifice deduction.

If you want to make changes, please cancel it and create a new one.

textTemplates.name: tt_body
textTemplates.text:
New Superannuation Salary Sacrifice added from the community for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName}.

Click Here to view the record.

Please note you will be required to complete any missing information and set the status to 'Active' once completed.

textTemplates.name: tt_Cancelled_body
textTemplates.text:
Superannuation Salary Sacrifice cancelled in the community for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName}.

Click Here to view the record.

Please note you will be required to complete any missing information and set the status to 'Active' once completed.

textTemplates.name: tt_Cancelled_Subject
textTemplates.text: Salary Sacrifice Cancelled in the community for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName} effective {!Expiry_Date}.

textTemplates.name: tt_Subject
textTemplates.text: New Superannuation Salary Sacrifice added from the community for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName}.

textTemplates.name: ttApprovedBody
textTemplates.text: Wage overpayments for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName} have been approved.

textTemplates.name: ttApprovedSubject
textTemplates.text: Wage overpayments for {!Get_User.Contact.FirstName} {!Get_User.Contact.LastName} have been approved.
